label: Auroral Sight Bedroom
description: Auroral Sight Bedroom is a narrow sleeping chamber cut from vitrified stone, its high walls bearing the loft’s permanent grit of electrostatically pinned glass dust. A slit window continues Cinderveil Loft’s calibrated alignment, admitting copper-white twilight in a sharply bounded band that traces the mirror-halo geometry across the floor. Mirror-slag inlays form a restrained grid around a low built-in sleeping platform, turning reflected radiance into a stable, navigational pattern at close range. Recessed alcoves and lidded niches are carved into the basalt-glass, limiting furnishings to integrated storage and preserving the residence’s austere civic order.
